nasb.text: Now all the people took note of it, and it pleased them, just as everything the king did pleased all the people.

esv.text: And all the people took notice of it, and it pleased them, as everything that the king did pleased all the people.

cnv.text: 眾人看見了，就都喜悅。王所作的一切，他們都很喜悅。

ccb.text: 众人听见了，都很喜悦，王做的每一件事都令他们喜悦。
